title: What Gets Built Next
subtitle: The deployed system is the research foundation. Each phase extends the architecture toward its full thesis.

phases.name: Phases 1–4 — SovereignSession Core Infrastructure
phases.description: Wallet-native video sessions, on-chain attestation, booking verification, privacy spec, browser matrix verified.

phases.name: Phase 5 — Encrypted Session Recording
phases.description: Client-side AES-256 encryption, IPFS pinning, participant-controlled decryption keys, on-chain hash. No server ever touches session content.

phases.name: Phase 6 — Avatar Layer
phases.description: 3D wallet-bound soulbound avatars replace raw video feeds. Zero biometric data transmitted. Futuristic FSL aesthetic. Three.js + Web Audio lip sync. HNT/achievement unlock system. Serious game designer collaboration required.

phases.name: Phase 7 — Therapeutic Content Upgrade
phases.description: EMDR, EFT/tapping, somatic visualization, brainwave entrainment, ECS/orthomolecular protocols, AI-adaptive wearable integration. Current 45 sessions are functional scaffolds — this phase adds clinical depth designed with faculty expertise.

phases.name: Phase 8 — Support Circles
phases.description: Multi-party sovereign wellness spaces. Group sessions as wallet-bound avatars — no faces, no names, pure pseudonymous group therapeutic experience. Multi-wallet HNT attribution. The FSL origin use case deployed at scale.

convergence: Individual therapeutic sessions (HypnoNeuro) → 1:1 sovereign video sessions (SovereignSession) → group sovereign wellness spaces (Support Circles) — all wallet-native, pseudonymous, on-chain attested, and avatar-mediated. The deployed system IS the research contribution.
